agent.name: KARA Intelligence
agent.description: KARA Intelligence offers on-chain research and tooling for OKX.AI users: token launch due diligence, smart contract quick audits, wallet security checks, smart-money and whale tracking, bridge route optimization, crypto news sentiment, and meme/pump scanning. All outputs are for research and informational purposes only and are not financial advice.

services.serviceDescription:
① Full due diligence on a new token launch: contract audit, holder concentration, smart money activity, social sentiment, and a SAFE / RISKY / SCAM verdict.
② Provide the token contract address and chain such as base, ethereum, or solana.

① Discover the most profitable wallets on X Layer ranked by realized PnL and win rate, with copy-strategy labels.
② Optional: provide time-frame (1D, 3D, 7D, 1M, 3M) and sort preference; defaults to 7D by PnL.

① Scan a wallet for dangerous token approvals, high-risk holdings, and known attack signatures.
② Provide the wallet address and chain; returns revoke-ready findings.

① Describe any on-chain workflow or alert you want (e.g. 'notify me when whale X moves >10K USDT on Base').
② KARA designs, builds, and deploys the automation for you via A2A task.

① Quick audit of a token or contract: ownership, mint risk, tax, honeypot flags, and dev history.
② Provide the contract address and chain such as base or ethereum.

① Aggregate PnL, win rate, and trading stats across multiple wallets into one dashboard.
② Provide a comma-separated list of wallet addresses and the chain.

① Latest DEX trades from smart money and KOL wallets on a chain, filtered by minimum volume.
② Provide chain and optional min-volume USD; default chain is base.

① Find the cheapest and fastest cross-chain bridge route between two tokens and chains.
② Provide from-token, from-chain, to-token, to-chain, and amount.

① Crypto news + social sentiment analysis for a token or topic, with trend direction and key events.
② Provide the symbol or topic such as BTC, ETH, or AI16Z; default is BTC.

① Scan newly launched meme tokens on a chain with holder, dev, sniper, and bundler risk filters.
② Provide chain such as base, solana, or bsc; default is base.
